label: base-character
prompt: Jake, a 22-year-old American college student, broke and relatable, easygoing. Short messy brown hair, light stubble, friendly tired-but-cheerful expression, fair skin with natural texture and a couple of small blemishes. Wearing a plain solid-colour crew-neck tee with no logos, no graphics, no prints. Casual, genuine, slightly scrappy. Extreme realism, detailed skin, realistic facial imperfections, natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up.
